description: Port src/app/api/webhooks/mdi/route.ts into a deployed vendor-facing Lambda endpoint. Scope: read raw request body with maxMdiWebhookPayloadBytes; require authorization and signature headers; verify MDI webhook signature before processing; call handleMdiWebhook with DynamoDB webhook-processing/idempotency repository, MDI mirror repository, and billing activation/cancellation hooks; resolve MDI and Stripe secrets only as needed; preserve idempotent processing and public error behavior. Wire POST /api/webhooks/mdi in CDK with least-privilege DynamoDB and Secrets Manager permissions. Acceptance criteria: live route exists; missing/invalid auth/signature fails; oversize payload fails; MDI fixture events process idempotently; billing activation/cancellation integration behavior matches existing Next route tests; no clinical questionnaire content is persisted in Apoth.
title: Add MDI webhook Lambda for POST /api/webhooks/mdi
